title: Process Observation
description: One entry in a run-time agent's Process Observations block. Structured so nightly rollups can aggregate observations across agent runs into an Org Health Report.

severity.description: info is reserved for healthy observations. Concerning/ambiguous use low|medium|high.

observation.description: One-sentence factual observation. Not an accusation.

evidence.description: What the agent was looking at when it made the call.

probe.description: If source=mcp_probe: the probe id or MCP tool name.

query.description: If applicable: the SOQL or grep pattern.

path.description: If source=repo_scan: the path where the observation originates.

suggested_followup_agent.description: Required iff category == suggested_followup. Must resolve to a real agents/<id>/ folder.

followup_reason.description: One-sentence 'because…' rationale for the follow-up agent.
